citation: Leung, H. H. 2014. Cantonese Coverbs: A Syntactic Reanalysis. MA qualifying paper, University of California, Berkeley.
claim_scope: Coverb phrases precede the main verb; inventory includes 喺 location, 向 direction, 由 source, and 經 path/via; category-analysis dispute

citation: Wong, Anita Mei-Yin. 2023. Understanding Development and Disorder in Cantonese Using Language Sample Analysis. Routledge.

citation: Shan, Yunming and Jin, Lixin. 2025. 粵語位移事件編碼類型再探 [Revisiting the Encoding Typology of Motion Events in Cantonese]. Language and Linguistics 26(2).

important_limit: The article advances a serial-verb/path-verb analysis that competes with complement analyses; its typology does not validate Canto Span labels or license every lexical combination.

citation: Yiu, Carine Yuk-man (姚玉敏). 2016. 粵語繼續體「落去」和開始體「起嚟」的產生. In 漢語研究的新貌：方言、語法與文獻 / New Horizons in the Study of Chinese: Dialectology, Grammar, and Philology, pp. 261-284.

claim_scope: Directional lexemes as predicates or complements; come/go deixis; manner-plus-direction; complex directionals; object-order differences; potential V-得/唔-directional restrictions; directional-to-aspect grammaticalization

citation: Liang, Yuqing and Mai, Ziyin. 2025. Supplementary materials for Grammatical development of the native L1 in Cantonese-English bilingual children: early costs and long-term gains. Bilingualism: Language and Cognition.

citation: Cheng, Lisa Lai-Shen and Rint Sybesma. 1999. Bare and Not-So-Bare Nouns and the Structure of NP. Linguistic Inquiry 30(4): 509-542.
claim_scope: Distribution, interpretation, and constituent structure of Cantonese bare nouns and classifier+noun phrases.

citation: Simpson, Andrew, Hooi Ling Soh, and Hiroki Nomoto. 2011. Bare classifiers and definiteness: A cross-linguistic investigation. Studies in Language 35(1): 168-193.
verified_locator: pp. 168-172; examples 1-3 and discussion of Hong Kong and Guangzhou Cantonese variation

citation: Yu, Dominic. 2006. Relative clauses and nominal modifiers in Cantonese. Unpublished research paper, University of California, Berkeley.
claim_scope: Cantonese nominal order, possessive classifier phrases, demonstrative-classifier phrases, and headless demonstrative+classifier NPs.

citation: Bond, Francis and Joanna Ut-Seong Sio. 2024. A Construction-based Approach to Cantonese Classifiers. Proceedings of the 31st International Conference on Head-Driven Phrase Structure Grammar, 60-75.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference paper with implemented grammar

important_limit: The HPSG analysis is one explicit formalization, not a settled universal ontology; its semantic type hierarchy should not be imported wholesale into Canto Span.

citation: Lam, Charles, Chaak Ming Lau, and Jackson L. Lee. 2024. Multi-Tiered Cantonese Word Segmentation. Proceedings of LREC-COLING 2024, 11993-12002.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference paper and corpus annotation scheme

important_limit: The paper specifies a word-segmentation annotation scheme rather than a complete syntax or semantics. Its segmentation distinctions corroborate overt boundaries but do not establish all argument structures, question types, ellipsis licensing, or parser nodes.

citation: Xia, Hengliang. 2025. Syntax of Classifiers and Measure Words in Three Chinese Languages. Proceedings of the 2025 Annual Conference of the Canadian Linguistic Association.
claim_scope: Cantonese Num-CL-N, Dem-CL-N, bare CL-N, Poss-CL-N distribution; coordination and noun-ellipsis diagnostics; limits on inserting jat1.
important_limit: Comparative judgments and the proposed right-branching analysis are author analyses; use distributional contrasts as evidence but retain competing structural analyses.

citation: Sio, Joanna Ut-Seong and Francis Bond. 2025. Inner and outer aspect in Cantonese. HPSG 2025 conference paper.

citation: Sybesma, Rint. 2013. Cantonese sin1 先 and the question of microvariation and macrovariation. citation: Alderete, John, Queenie Chan, Macarius Chan, Gloria Fan, and Olivia Nickel. 2017. Cantonese Grammar Synopsis.
publication_type: university-hosted scholarly grammar synopsis with full text and literature cross-references

citation: Francis, Elaine J., and Stephen Matthews. 2005. A multi-dimensional approach to the category verb in Cantonese. Journal of Linguistics 41(2):269-305.

important_limit: Only the official abstract and metadata were verified in this batch; do not attribute uninspected examples, diagnostics, or detailed feature values to the article.

verified_locator: official repository abstract and metadata; abstract distinction 咪/唔好 versus ordinary negator 唔

important_limit: Abstract-level verification does not establish every syntactic environment or resolve every ambiguous orthographic string beginning with 唔好.

citation: Lam, Cherry Chit-Yu. 2018. On the Interaction between Negation and Aspect in Grammaticalisation: A Cross-linguistic Study of Three Chinese Varieties. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):215-232.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official university-hosted full text
verified_locator: pp. 215-218, especially Table 1 and examples (1)-(3); pp. 227-230 on the existential > possessive > aspect pathway
claim_scope: Hong Kong Cantonese split negation; 冇 as negative existential/possessive and perfective negator; positive 有 versus negative 冇; separation from ordinary 唔 and copular negation.
important_limit: The grammaticalisation and Minimalist analyses are theory-specific. The article does not establish every discourse fragment, question template, availability nominal, or parser category used by Canto Span.

citation: Liang, Yuqing, and Ziyin Mai. 2026 [published online 2025]. Grammatical development of the native L1 in Cantonese-English bilingual children: early costs and long-term gains. Bilingualism: Language and Cognition 29(3):795-808. Supplementary coding scheme.

claim_scope: Operational coding of Cantonese existential questions as 有冇 + NP and in-situ wh-questions; attested examples including 呢度有冇車車呀, 做乜有一個橙嘅, and 有幾多架車呀.
important_limit: The coding scheme is designed for child-language sample analysis and explicitly uses closed/open category decisions. It supports attested forms and a research coding distinction, not an exhaustive adult grammar or proof of Canto Span node boundaries.

citation: Lau, Helena Yan Ping, and Sophia Yat Mei Lee. 2021. On Resultative Verb Compounds in Cantonese and Mandarin. Lingua Sinica 7(1):23-50.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; author-uploaded full text and official university metadata
verified_locator: pp. 23-25, 33, and 41-44; abstract; resultative comparisons and summary table
claim_scope: Restricted distribution of Cantonese lexical resultative verb compounds; distinct V-到 result constructions, verb-copying V-到, and causative alternatives; event-role and argument-configuration constraints.
important_limit: The proposed linking rules and judgments are analysis-specific and do not exhaust contemporary speaker variation. Attested alternatives do not license arbitrary verbs, result predicates, objects, or parser node boundaries.

citation: Cheng, Lisa Lai-Shen, and Rint Sybesma. 2004. Postverbal can in Cantonese (and Hakka) and Agree. Lingua 114(4):419-445.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; author-uploaded full text and publisher metadata
verified_locator: author PDF pp. 2-5 and 18-20; examples (1)-(4), section 2 summary, footnote 6, and section 4.3
claim_scope: Postverbal 得 in permission/ability and result-potential structures; positive V-得-R; negative potential V-唔-R; directional potential examples; separate postverbal descriptive 得 construction.
important_limit: The formal Agree/small-clause analysis is theory-specific, and the paper reports judgment differences from earlier descriptions. It does not license every verb, result head, directional sequence, or bare V得 as potential.

citation: Sio, Joanna Ut-Seong. 2011. The Cantonese ge3. In F. H. Yap, K. Grunow-Hårsta, and J. Wrona (eds.), Nominalization in Asian Languages: Diachronic and Typological Perspectives, 125-146. John Benjamins.
claim_scope: Adnominal ge3 after adjectives, possessors, relative clauses, and nominal complements; restricted bare modifiers; interpretive contrast between bare and ge3 modifiers; referential headless modifier-ge3 nominals; distinction from sentence-final ge3.
important_limit: The chapter advances a particular indexical and empty-noun analysis. Surface distributions and examples may be used, but the parser must not import a silent noun, a single unified ge3 analysis, or unrestricted modifier productivity.

citation: Chan, Angel, Stephen Matthews, and Virginia Yip. 2011. The Acquisition of Relative Clauses in Cantonese and Mandarin. In E. Kidd (ed.), The Acquisition of Relative Clauses: Processing, Typology and Function, 197-225. John Benjamins.
claim_scope: Prenominal Cantonese relative clauses; classifier relatives and ge3 relatives; ge3 as an overt link between modifying clause and head noun; internally headed and noun-modifying-construction analyses as live alternatives.
important_limit: The chapter reviews competing processing and syntactic analyses. Its examples establish overt construction types, not a mandatory filler-gap derivation or the runtime’s object-gap heuristic.

citation: Chan, Angel, Wenchun Yang, Franklin Chang, and Evan Kidd. 2018. Four-year-old Cantonese-speaking children’s online processing of relative clauses: A permutation analysis. Journal of Child Language 45(1): 174-203.
verified_locator: publisher abstract and article metadata; pp. 174-203
claim_scope: Classifier and ge3 relative clauses as distinct Cantonese constructions with different frequencies, syntactic analyses, and processing profiles.
important_limit: A child-processing experiment does not by itself establish adult productivity, all relative-clause subtypes, or one correct syntactic theory. Use it to preserve the constructional distinction.

citation: Winterstein, Grégoire, David Vergnaud, Jérémie Lupien, Samuel Laperle, Hannah Yu, Christopher Davis, and Zoe Pei Sui Luk. 2023. An empirical, corpus-based, approach to Cantonese nominal expressions. Proceedings of PACLIC 37, 436-445.
claim_scope: Corpus-based inventory of Cantonese nominal expressions; di1 as a plural classifier in CL-N and NUM-CL-N patterns; compatibility with jat1; positional and information-structural interpretation boundaries.
important_limit: The corpus and annotations do not make di1 an English-style plural morpheme or assign a fixed some/the/these translation. The authors’ semantic analysis is not a parser ontology.

citation: Tang, Jason. 2024. Guide to Cantonese Grammar. Version dated 22 January 2024.
publication_type: author-produced descriptive learner grammar; openly available full text; not peer reviewed
verified_locator: pp. 35-39; sections on dates, deictic time periods, duration, and telling time
claim_scope: Exact contemporary Cantonese forms including 上個星期, 下個月, 上年/下年 without 個, duration contrasts such as 一個月 versus 一年, and conventional 個字 units where one 個字 equals five minutes.
important_limit: The author explicitly presents this as a learner guide rather than a linguistic analysis. Use it to attest exact forms and pedagogical contrasts, not to prove productivity, exhaustive classifier selection, syntactic category, corpus frequency, or universal judgments.

citation: Wong, Lai-yin. 2002. The Morphology, Syntax, and Semantics of Adverbs in Cantonese. MPhil thesis, The University of Hong Kong.
publication_type: university MPhil thesis; official institutional-repository full text
verified_locator: PDF pp. 25-26 (printed pp. 18-19), section distinguishing time words from adverbs; related distributional discussion
claim_scope: Time words as nouns rather than a lexical adverb subclass; their ability to function as subject, modifier, object, or adverbial; compatibility with prepositions; distinction between lexical category and adverbial function.
important_limit: The thesis adopts a particular formal classification and does not provide a complete inventory of time nouns, classifier selection, temporal-clause types, or learner-facing parser nodes. Category analysis should not be converted into hidden structure.

citation: Yip, Ka-Fai. 2024. Two Types of Temporal Adverbial Clauses in Cantonese. In Proceedings of the 39th West Coast Conference on Formal Linguistics, ed. Robert Autry et al., 687-694. Cascadilla Proceedings Project.
publication_type: peer-reviewed conference proceedings paper; official publisher full text
verified_locator: pp. 687-690, especially examples (3)-(4) and section 2 on hai- and dong-temporal adverbial clauses
claim_scope: Two overt Cantonese temporal-adverbial-clause types: 喺-headed clauses requiring a time head such as 嗰陣(時)/時候, and 當-headed clauses whose head time NP may be omitted; distinct internal and attachment properties.
important_limit: The operator-movement and attachment analysis is theory-specific. The paper establishes overt temporal-clause subtypes and contrasts, not that every initial time expression is a subordinate clause or that the runtime’s broad TemporalClause node is valid.

citation: Kataoka, Shin (片岡新). 2018. 從早期和現代語料看粵語進行體標記“緊”在複句中的功能. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 97(1):133-141.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official journal full text
verified_locator: pp. 133-136, especially examples (2)-(7), and corpus counts on pp. 135-136
claim_scope: Postverbal V緊 as progressive; contrast between 緊 and continuous 住; attested telic/motion, state-like, and extended-process uses; discourse/backgrounding use in complex sentences.
important_limit: The article focuses on historical and discourse functions of 緊. Its examples show distribution beyond an action-verb list but do not establish unrestricted lexical productivity or the parser’s exact directional and question templates.

citation: Fan, Xiaolei (范曉蕾). 2024. 香港粵語“有 VP”的時體意義——兼論普通話的“沒”. Current Research in Chinese Linguistics 103(1):1-30. DOI: 10.29499/CrCL.202401_103(1).00012.
publication_type: peer-reviewed journal article; official journal full text
verified_locator: pp. 4-9, especially examples (3)-(9), Table 1, and discussion of V過, V緊, and V住
claim_scope: Aspectual contrasts among 過, 喺度, 住, 緊, and 咗; V過 as experiential/event-type predication; V緊 as dynamic progressive; V住 as continuous/static and favored in certain subordinate or accompanying-action VPs; 有+V過 distribution.
important_limit: The paper advances a specific stative/dynamic and nominalization analysis centered on auxiliary 有. Those theoretical classifications are not adopted wholesale, and its judgments do not license free V住/V緊 substitution or every 有+aspect combination.

citation: Matthews, Stephen and Virginia Yip. 2011. Cantonese: A Comprehensive Grammar, 2nd ed. Multimedia supplement, Chapter 11: Aspect and verbal particles. Chinese University of Hong Kong.
publication_type: scholarly reference-grammar multimedia supplement hosted by the authors’ university
verified_locator: Chapter 11, sections 11.2.2-11.2.6; examples 起緊, 陪住你, 食過…未, and 冇去街
claim_scope: Exact reference examples for progressive 緊, continuous 住, experiential 過, final 未 experiential questions, and auxiliary 冇; overt aspect markers remain visible in the construction.
important_limit: The page is a curated example supplement rather than a full argument for productivity, lexical restrictions, node granularity, or a dedicated question subtype.
